scenarios.name: product-crud-with-state-error-handling
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response B omits the required State<AppState> extractor.

scenarios.name: auth-middleware-with-user-extension
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies the rubric by using middleware::from_fn_with_state, extracting the Bearer token, validating it, injecting the user ID, and applying it to a protected route, whereas Response B uses from_fn instead of from_fn_with_state, missing that key requirement.
